title: Contains Duplicate
description:
Given an integer array `nums`, return `True` if any value appears at least twice in the array, and return `False` if every element is distinct.

**Example 1:**
Input: nums = [1,2,3,1]
Output: True

**Example 2:**
Input: nums = [1,2,3,4]
Output: False
hints: A naive approach checks every pair in O(n^2).
Sorting the array first makes it O(n log n).
Can you use a Hash Set to track seen numbers in O(1) time per element?
